title: stenophragma nudum
intro: Stenophragma nudum, also known as Naked Stenophragma, is a plant species belonging to the family Gentianaceae, native to Africa and Madagascar. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stenophragma nudum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Stenophragma nudum can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
